customAttributes.description:
Nonartifact spells you cast have improvise. (Your artifacts can help cast those spells. Each artifact you tap after you're done activating mana abilities pays for 1.)
A numbered series of 500 copies of this card was found within the The Brothers' War Collector Booster product. The number on the card you receive will vary from the number pictured in the listing unless otherwise shown in a Listing with Photo.
customAttributes.flavorText: "In the early days, Urza's wondrous automatons were seen as symbols of hope and courage." —The Antiquities War
